source.reference: .300 AAC Blackout (7.62x35mm) supersonic. 110gr (7.1g) FMJ. MV ~610 m/s from 406mm (16in) barrel. G7 BC ~0.139 for 110gr .308-cal FMJ (Litz estimate). Caliber .308in = 7.82mm.
source.methodology: BC values sourced from Bryan Litz's Applied Ballistics published Doppler radar measurements and form factor analysis.

fragmentation.notes: 110gr FMJ. Limited fragmentation at ~610 m/s MV; barely above frag threshold.
